name: ExtensionSubstanceSourceMaterial_OrganismId
title: R5: The unique identifier associated with the source material parent organism shall be specified (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceSourceMaterial.organismId` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceSourceMaterial.organismId` 0..1 `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `SubstanceSourceMaterial.organismId` 0..1 `Identifier`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceSourceMaterial.organismId` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubstanceSourceMaterial` is not mapped.
Element `SubstanceSourceMaterial.organismId` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
